title: Senior Associate – Accounting & Finance
metaDescription: Senior Associate – Accounting & Finance role in Singapore: prepare full sets of accounts, management reports, GST, and review junior work.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Senior Associate to join our Accounting & Finance Team in Singapore.
duties: Prepare full sets of accounts and management reports for clients.
Handle GST submissions and statutory financial reporting.
Review work prepared by junior associates.
Liaise with clients and auditors on accounting matters.
Support process improvements within the team.
requirements: Degree or Diploma in Accountancy or Finance.
Good knowledge of accounting standards and GST.
Detail-oriented and able to manage deadlines.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
